text: No diffused nonglaring light on a vehicle shall resemble any official traffic control device.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 12. EQUIPMENT OF VEHICLES [24000 - 28244]
### Chapter 2. Lighting Equipment [24250 - 26106]
#### Article 10. Diffused Lights [25400 - 25401]
##### § 25401

No diffused nonglaring light on a vehicle shall resemble any official traffic control device.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: No diffused nonglaring light on a vehicle shall resemble any official traffic control device.
